column3: Pharma ISS - Schedule Side by Sides
column6: No meeting during this Self-paced time. Schedule your side by sides for the week one of onboarding with your assigned mentor in Outlook, please ensure that your direct manager is on the invite as optional. If your mentor declines any of them reach out to your management team to schedule with another rep from your sites mentor bench. Please also schedule your 1:1 in week 2 with your direct leader at the time set on this schedule. IF you and another new hire are doubled up with a mentor please work together to schedule ONE meeting per side by side. Once you have scheduled your side by sides go In your mySpark curriculum to Active and mark complete the Pharma ISS - Schedule Side by Sides item.

column3: Pharma ISS - Pronunciations and Cross Selling - Action Learning

Log into the open meeting link in your Outlook calendar or connect live if you are in person. As a new hire cohort, informally practice pronunciations. You have no rubric or item to mark complete in mySpark - this session is just for practice.

column3:
Side-by-side Guide for New Hires #1 - Action Learning
Topic: Prospecting
column6: Log into the open meeting link in your Outlook calendar you scheduled with your mentor or peer. In your mySpark curriculum launch, download, save and fill in your Side-by-side Guide for New Hires #1 - Action Learning. Once your side by side is complete return to mySpark and mark complete your side by side. After marking complete, take the post-test, which is copying your answers/notes from the guide you downloaded and saved into the corresponding questions in mySpark. Hit Submit Final Answers once your have answered all the questions.
